blockingIssues.description: server/routes.ts getSeedUserId() resolves fallback via `SELECT ... FROM users LIMIT 1`, which is non-deterministic and can assign unauthenticated creates/imports to a non-seed user in multi-user environments.

appliedUpdates.description: Updated .factory/library/relationshipos-schema-notes.md to document deterministic seed-user fallback lookup and the seed username used by scripts/seed.ts.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Clarify deterministic seed-user fallback resolution for unauthenticated contact-creation paths (e.g., resolve by known seed identity such as username `brian_placeholder`, not `LIMIT 1`).
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: fix-user-scoping-gaps review found the fallback implementation selecting an arbitrary user row despite migration guardrails requiring seed-user fallback.
